title: Crash n' Burn
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Crashnburn.jpg|thumb|200px|Crash n' Burn]]

'''Crash n' Burn''' was a form of recreational [[Spice/Legends|spice]] that was created during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It was popular among [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].

==Behind the scenes==
Crash n' Burn first appeared in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], as a lootable item found on the ''Corellian Corvette'' missions, and also as a craftable spice. Ever since the New Game Enchancements of [[2005]], the ability to craft this spice had been removed.

==Appearances==
